questions.q: In the Ramayana, whose younger brother is Vibhishana?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana is the virtuous younger brother of Ravana, the rakshasa king of Lanka.

questions.q: To which race of beings does Vibhishana belong in the Ramayana?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana is a rakshasa, the righteous brother born into Ravana's demon clan.

questions.q: In the Ramayana, which captive did Vibhishana repeatedly urge Ravana to return?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana counselled Ravana to return Sita to Rama and uphold dharma.

questions.q: Whose side did Vibhishana cross over to after being spurned by Ravana?
questions.explanation: Banished by Ravana, Vibhishana crossed the sea and took refuge with Rama.

questions.q: Of which island kingdom is Vibhishana made king at the end of the Ramayana war?
questions.explanation: After Ravana's death, Rama consecrates Vibhishana as the new king of Lanka.

questions.q: Vibhishana is counted among which group of immortal or long-lived beings in Hindu tradition?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana is traditionally counted among the chiranjivis, the long-lived or deathless ones.

questions.q: In which epic does the story of Vibhishana primarily appear?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana's story is told principally in Valmiki's Ramayana.

questions.q: Which quality is Vibhishana most celebrated for in the Ramayana?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana is honoured as a righteous figure who upholds dharma even against his own brother.

questions.q: In the Ramayana, against whom did Rama wage the war that Vibhishana eventually joined?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana joined Rama's army in the war against his own brother Ravana of Lanka.

questions.q: What happened to Vibhishana in Lanka after he advised Ravana to make peace with Rama?
options: He was sent on a quest
questions.explanation: Spurned for his counsel, Vibhishana was banished from Lanka by Ravana.

questions.q: Who was the father of Vibhishana, Ravana, and Kumbhakarna in the Ramayana?
questions.explanation: The sage Vishrava fathered Vibhishana along with his brothers Ravana and Kumbhakarna.

questions.q: From which ancestral sage, one of the mind-born sons of Brahma, did Vibhishana descend through his father?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana's grandfather was the sage Pulastya, one of the mind-born sons of Brahma.

questions.q: According to the Ramayana, what boon did Vibhishana ask of Brahma after his austerities?
options: That his mind never stray from dharma
questions.explanation: When granted a boon, Vibhishana asked that his mind always remain firmly fixed on dharma.

questions.q: Which colossal brother of Vibhishana was cursed to sleep for six months at a stretch?
questions.explanation: Kumbhakarna, Vibhishana's giant brother, was condemned to long spells of slumber.

questions.q: When Vibhishana first approached Rama's camp, what was Sugriva's initial counsel about him?
options: To send him back to Lanka
questions.explanation: Sugriva at first urged caution, suspecting Vibhishana might be a spy, before Rama accepted him.

questions.q: Which mighty warrior of Lanka, Ravana's son, was a nephew of Vibhishana?
questions.explanation: Indrajit, also called Meghanada, was Ravana's son and thus Vibhishana's nephew.

questions.q: In the Ramayana war, how did Vibhishana chiefly aid Rama's forces?
options: By revealing the rakshasas' secrets and weaknesses
questions.explanation: Knowing Lanka intimately, Vibhishana revealed the rakshasas' secrets, strategies, and weaknesses to Rama.

questions.q: Whom did Rama send, along with others, to perform the funeral rites for the slain Ravana?
questions.explanation: After much persuasion, Vibhishana performed the final rites for his brother Ravana at Rama's urging.

questions.q: Before crossing to Rama, how many companions are traditionally said to have accompanied Vibhishana?
questions.explanation: The Ramayana relates that four trusted rakshasa ministers accompanied Vibhishana when he joined Rama.

questions.q: What did Vibhishana counsel Ravana about the abducted Sita, reflecting his commitment to dharma?
options: To return her honourably to Rama
questions.explanation: Vibhishana repeatedly advised Ravana to return Sita honourably to Rama and avoid ruin.

questions.q: In the Ramayana, what kind of role did Vibhishana hold in Ravana's court before his banishment?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana served as a wise counsellor to Ravana, urging righteous conduct in the court of Lanka.

questions.q: Which queen of Ravana, like Vibhishana, urged the king to return Sita and avoid war?
questions.explanation: Mandodari, Ravana's chief queen, shared Vibhishana's counsel that Sita be returned to Rama.

questions.q: According to the Ramayana, in what location did Vibhishana, Ravana, and Kumbhakarna perform their great austerities to win boons from Brahma?
questions.explanation: The brothers are said to have performed their austerities at Gokarna to obtain boons from Brahma.

questions.q: Who was the mother of Vibhishana, Ravana, and Kumbhakarna in the Ramayana?
questions.explanation: Their mother was Kaikasi, a rakshasa princess wedded to the sage Vishrava.

questions.q: Which god of wealth was a half-brother of Vibhishana and Ravana in the Ramayana?
questions.explanation: Kubera, the god of wealth, was a half-brother of Ravana and Vibhishana, born to the sage Vishrava.

questions.q: In the Ramayana, what was the name of Vibhishana's wife, the gentle rakshasi who reassured the captive Sita?
questions.explanation: Sarama, the wife of Vibhishana, comforted and reassured Sita during her captivity in Lanka.

questions.q: In the Ramayana, when Ravana mustered all his might, what did Vibhishana foretell would be Lanka's fate if Sita were not returned?
options: Its destruction and the death of the rakshasas
questions.explanation: Vibhishana warned that keeping Sita would bring about the destruction of Lanka and its rakshasa host.

questions.q: According to the Ramayana, which weapon-empowered foe did Vibhishana help Lakshmana overcome by guiding him to interrupt a secret rite?
questions.explanation: Vibhishana guided Lakshmana to Indrajit's hidden sacrifice, helping bring about the rakshasa prince's defeat.

questions.q: In later devotional tradition, Vibhishana is sometimes honoured for his unwavering devotion to which form of the divine?
questions.explanation: Devotional tradition reveres Vibhishana as a model devotee who surrendered wholly to Rama as the supreme Lord.

questions.q: In the Ramayana, what does Rama grant Vibhishana that allows his line and reign to endure for a vast age?
options: The kingship of Lanka and great longevity
questions.explanation: Rama bestows upon Vibhishana the throne of Lanka and a blessing of long life, marking him among the chiranjivis.
